'''Kirima Kalinda''' was the mother of [[free-trader]] [[Jak Kalinda]], who discovered the [[Kalinda system/Legends|Kalinda system]]. Jak named a [[Kirima (Kalinda system)|planet]] in the system after her.

{{Char-stub}}
